description: Heap product analytics connector — syncs users, events, segments, and user properties. Supports server-side event tracking and user identification via Heap's REST and Server-Side APIs.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Heap is an auto-capture product analytics platform. This connector reads user lists, aggregated event counts, and segment definitions from Heap's REST API, and can push server-side events and user properties via the Heap Server-Side API.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: Authentication uses a Bearer token passed in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer {api_key}). Server-side write operations (track, identify) additionally require the app_id in the POST body. Obtain your API key from Heap Dashboard → Account → Privacy & Security → API Keys.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Heap Bearer token. Found under Account → Privacy & Security → API Keys.

fields.label: App ID / Account ID
fields.description: Your Heap App ID (numeric). Found in the Heap dashboard URL or under Account → General.

items.name: sync
items.description: Full sync of users, events, and segments

items.name: users
items.description: Identified users and their custom properties

items.name: events
items.description: Aggregated event counts over configurable time ranges

items.name: segments
items.description: User segments defined in the Heap project

sections.title: Rate Limits
sections.content: Heap enforces per-account rate limits. The connector automatically retries on 429 responses with exponential backoff and honours the Retry-After header. Reduce sync frequency if persistent throttling occurs.
